name: liteparse
tagline: Wraps the real, popular open-source LiteParse library for local PDF/document parsing with OCR, bounding boxes, and JSON output.
verdict: Clean skill: the underlying package is a verified, real, 11.6k-star open-source project (run-llama/LlamaIndex), all parsing stays local with no cloud calls, triggers and anti-triggers are clear, and failure paths (missing LibreOffice/ImageMagick, bad PDFs) are documented. No secret access, destructive ops, or hidden instructions found. Minor drift: pinned ex
